allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "e:\\agent_cyberhack\\data\\raw_datasets\\tool_scripts\\" -Recurse -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Parent.Parent.Name -eq "tool_scripts" -or $_.Parent.Name -eq "tool_scripts" } | Select-Object @{N='Category';E={$_.Parent.Name}}, Name | Sort-Object Category)
